title: router-hosts v0.5.0 Design Document
summary: Technical design for router-hosts: event-sourced DNS host management via a gRPC/mTLS client-server architecture with data models and validation rules.
notes: Design doc with strong SPEC signals (data models, gRPC API, schemas, validation contracts). Contains a Key Design Decisions table (ADR-like), but not a numbered/accepted ADR; Status: Active. SPEC chosen over PRD/DOC by dominant implementation-contract content.
